title: Adult dyslexia tests to be developed within 3 years: NIMHANS tells Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court on April 15 disposed of a plea seeking the development of proper testing methods for diagnosing dyslexia in adults after being informed by the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS) that such tools would be developed within three years [N Sai Balaji vs. Union of India & Ors.]. A Bench of Justices Manoj Misra and Manmohan recorded the assurance given by NIMHANS and said that the petitioner would be at liberty to revive the proceedings if no progress
